text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After receiving messages of support from the
people of the shopping district, Nice Nature aims
to answer their kind words with victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the Arima Kinen is a race that gathers
powerhouses from each generation, including
Mejiro McQueen and Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It is a race that cannot be won with ordinary
tactics. Determined to surpass the other racers
and walk the path of a main character, Nice
Nature makes for the track.
